pages.title: Six States
pages.text: Every Titan's Remnant can be raised through $(l)Dormant$(), $(l)Latent$(), $(l)Awakened$(), $(l)Ascended$(), $(l)Transcendent$(), and $(l)Apex$().$(br2)Dormant, Latent, and Awakened can be used by any mortal. Ascended and Transcendent require the bearer to wear the Oathbound Relic. Apex additionally demands near-complete Branded attunement.

pages.title: Current Upgrade Path
pages.text: Hold the remnant in your $(l)main hand$() and the catalyst in your $(l)offhand$(), then use the remnant.$(br2)Dormant -> Latent: $(item)oathboundrelics:oblivion_stone$()$(br)Latent -> Awakened: $(item)oathboundrelics:void_ashes$()$(br)Awakened -> Ascended: $(item)oathboundrelics:mirrorsteel_idol$()$(br)Ascended -> Transcendent: $(item)minecraft:nether_star$()$(br)Transcendent -> Apex: $(item)oathboundrelics:soul_gem$()

pages.title: Suppressed Power
pages.text: A remnant keeps its stored stage, but the wearer only gains the highest stage they are worthy to use.$(br2)A non-Branded wearer is capped at $(l)Awakened$().$(br)A Branded wearer with the Oathbound Relic is capped at $(l)Transcendent$().$(br)Only one who has endured roughly $(l)99.5%$() Branded attunement may fully wield $(l)Apex$().
